mapper.select: SELECT member_id, member_email, member_pass, member_name, member_phone, member_address, member_gender, member_birth, member_nick, member_role, member_status, balance, created_at, updated_at FROM MEMBER WHERE member_email = #{memberEmail} AND member_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT member_id, member_email, member_pass, member_name, member_phone, member_address, member_gender, member_birth, member_nick, member_role, member_status, balance, created_at, updated_at FROM MEMBER WHERE member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT member_id, member_email, member_pass, member_name, member_phone, member_address, member_gender, member_birth, member_nick, member_role, member_status, balance, created_at, updated_at FROM MEMBER WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( member_id, member_email, member_pass, member_name, member_phone, member_address, member_gender, member_birth, member_nick, member_role, member_status, balance ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPass}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberGender, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberBirth, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{memberNick, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memberRole}, #{memberStatus}, #{balance} )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET balance = #{balance}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE MEMBER SET member_status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
